🚀 Hiring: Senior Python Full Stack Developer (Remote – India)

We are looking for a Senior Python Full Stack Developer with 5–8 years of experience to join our team. This is a full-time role offered as a 1-year contract, with strong potential for extension based on performance.

⚠️ Note: Strictly no third parties. Direct candidates only.

If you enjoy building scalable applications and working with modern AI-driven systems, this could be a great fit for you.
In this role, you will be working on end-to-end development — from designing backend services in Python to building responsive frontends and integrating AI-powered solutions.
💻 Tech Stack:
 Python | React | Node.js | JavaScript | Azure | Generative AI (Gen AI) | RAG Pipelines | Databricks (Preferred)
🔍 What We’re Looking For:
5–8 years of experience in full stack development
Strong experience in Python-based backend development
Hands-on with React and modern frontend frameworks
Experience with Node.js and REST API development
Exposure to Azure cloud services
Working knowledge of AI tools, especially Gen AI and RAG pipelines
Experience with Databricks or data engineering workflows is a big plus
Ability to work independently in a remote environment
📍 Location: Remote (India)
 📅 Duration: 1 Year Contract (Extendable based on performance)
 💰 Salary: Depends on experience
If you're someone who likes solving real-world problems using full-stack + AI capabilities, we’d love to connect!
📩 Feel free to reach out or share your profile.
nagendraworkspace@gmail.com

Hiring for Fortune 500 (Direct Clients) | Helping professionals to take a step ahead in their career | Connect me for W2/ C2C roles | Talent Acquisition | Recruiting / Hiring Fulltime jobs

Hi All,
I am hiring for below mentioned role.

Role- AI/ML Engineer
Location - Remote 
Job Type - Contract

Seeking AI/ML Engineers with 3–7 years of hands on experience building scalable ML and GenAI solutions. 

Candidates must have strong healthcare domain exposure (claims, clinical data, provider/payor workflows). 

Key Responsibilities
AI/ML Engineering
• Build and deploy production grade ML, NLP, and LLM/GenAI models.
• Implement modern AI architecture patterns: microservices, feature stores, real time/batch inference, embeddings, and retrieval pipelines.
• Convert functional requirements into scalable AI solutions.

Model Development
• Develop and optimize models for claims automation, fraud detection, risk prediction, provider optimization, and document AI.
• Ensure models meet performance, reliability, and scalability standards.

Data & Integration
• Work with data engineering teams to integrate models with healthcare datasets (claims, EHR, clinical notes, PA/UM workflows).
• Ensure PHI/PII safe, compliant pipelines.

MLOps / Platform
• Implement CI/CD for ML/LLM workloads using MLflow, Vertex, SageMaker, Databricks, Airflow, Argo, and Kubernetes.
• Apply LLM Ops foundations for RAG and GenAI use cases.

Collaboration & Delivery
• Work cross functionally with product, cloud engineering, SMEs, and clinical teams.
• Participate in Agile processes and document reusable patterns and decisions.

Required Skills
• 3–7 years AI/ML engineering experience.
• Strong skills in Python (PyTorch/TensorFlow), NLP/LLMs/transformers, GenAI tooling, SQL, and data pipelines.
• Experience deploying ML/LLM systems in Azure/AWS/GCP.
• Solid understanding of U.S. healthcare data and compliant solution design (HIPAA, RBAC, audit logging).
• Experience working in ML Ops / LLM Ops environments.

Lead Technical Recruiter
Next Level Business Services, Inc.
Consulting| Analytics| Staff Augmentation
E-Mail: mohd.alam@recruiter.nlbtech.com

Job by HTC Global Services

India (Remote)

AI Engineer - Airline Domain  

Senior Technical Recruiter at HTC Global Services

Exciting Opportunity Alert! 🌟 HTC Global Services is hiring AI Engineer for an Airline Project.

HTC Global Services - a leading CMM level 5 global provider of innovative IT and Business Process Services and Solutions since 1990 with headquarters in Troy, Michigan, USA.

Key Responsibilities
Build and maintain LLM driven enterprise level applications in real production environment.
Design and develop MCP tools using Python, FastAPI, or similar frameworks
· Maintain multiple MCP services and LLM integrations.
· Develop Angular-based conversational user interfaces with real-time updates.
Design scalable architectures capable of supporting high concurrency.
Implement monitoring, logging, and tracing for AI workflows.
Continuously optimize latency, cost, and response quality.
Implement and support multi-agent architectures with context sharing and orchestration
Implement WebSocket-based communication for streaming AI responses
Use Redis for caching, session management, and conversation memory
Maintain scalable services for conversation state, workflow, and memory handling
· Strong understanding of API contracts and schema-driven development.
Understanding of Prompt engineering, Structured outputs, Tool calling patterns, Model limitations and failure modes.
· Good Understanding of Agent orchestration patterns, Role-based agents, Task decomposition, Coordination and fallback mechanisms.
Technical Skills
Frontend:
Angular / React
RxJS and reactive programming
Real-time UI updates using WebSockets
Backend:
Python
FastAPI / async services
API and middleware development
AI & Platform:
LLM integrations and tool calling
MCP / FastMCP
LangChain, LangGraph
Multi-agent architectures
Systems & Infrastructure:
Distributed systems and scalability concepts
WebSockets, event-driven systems
Redis (caching, session, memory)
Databases: Cosmos DB, MongoDB
Vector databases: Pinecone or similar
Cloud & DevOps:
Azure, Azure AI Foundry
Azure GitHub (PRs, branching, CI/CD pipelines)

Interested candidates please do share your updated CV to mubeenakamal.basha@htcinc.com mentioning your Current CTC, expected CTC and notice period details.
